stages.name: 小学
stages.description: 小学品德与社会中的历史故事启蒙，以简单易懂的历史故事和传统文化为主

eras.name: 远古传说
eras.description: 盘古开天、女娲补天、神农尝百草、大禹治水等远古传说故事
eras.descriptionEn: Legends of Pangu creating the heavens and earth, Nüwa patching the sky, Shennong tasting hundreds of herbs, and Yu the Great taming the floods

chapters.title: 盘古开天地
chapters.summary: 了解盘古开天辟地的传说

chapters.title: 女娲造人与补天
chapters.summary: 认识女娲造人和补天的故事

chapters.title: 神农尝百草
chapters.summary: 神农氏为百姓尝试各种草药的故事

chapters.title: 大禹治水
chapters.summary: 大禹三过家门而不入，带领百姓治理洪水

eras.name: 三国故事
eras.description: 桃园三结义、草船借箭、三顾茅庐等经典三国故事
eras.descriptionEn: Classic stories of the Three Kingdoms: the Oath of the Peach Garden, borrowing arrows with straw boats, and three visits to the thatched cottage

chapters.title: 桃园三结义

chapters.title: 草船借箭

chapters.title: 空城计
chapters.summary: 诸葛亮面对司马懿的空城之计

chapters.title: 三顾茅庐
chapters.summary: 刘备三次拜访诸葛亮请其出山

eras.name: 唐朝故事
eras.description: 贞观之治、文成公主进藏、玄奘西行等唐朝经典故事
eras.descriptionEn: Classic Tang Dynasty stories including the Zhenguan Governance, Princess Wencheng's journey to Tibet, and Xuanzang's pilgrimage to the West

chapters.title: 贞观之治
chapters.summary: 了解唐太宗李世民治理国家的故事

chapters.title: 文成公主进藏
chapters.summary: 文成公主远嫁吐蕃促进民族友好

chapters.title: 玄奘西行

eras.name: 英雄故事

eras.descriptionEn: Traditional heroic stories including Yue Fei's loyalty, Sima Guang smashing the vat, and Hua Mulan joining the army in her father's place

chapters.title: 岳飞精忠报国

chapters.title: 司马光砸缸

chapters.title: 花木兰替父从军
chapters.summary: 花木兰女扮男装替父从军的传奇

chapters.title: 造纸术

chapters.title: 活字印刷术

chapters.title: 指南针的发明

eras.descriptionEn: Historical stories and cultural customs behind traditional festivals such as the Spring Festival, Dragon Boat Festival, and Mid-Autumn Festival

stages.name: 初中
